examples.title: Selective Repeat Sender
examples.code:
PROCEDURE SendFrame
WHILE window_not_full DO
    send_frame(next_seq_num)
    start_timer(next_seq_num)
    next_seq_num++
ON ACK_RECEIVED(seq_num):
    mark_as_acked(seq_num)
    advance_window()
ON TIMEOUT(seq_num):
    retransmit_frame(seq_num)
    restart_timer(seq_num)
examples.explanation: Maintains individual timers per frame and selective ACK handling
